name: Sliders RPG
description: You’re a scientist (or hacker, rogue traveler, etc.) who created a wormhole device—a handheld "timer" that can open portals to parallel worlds. But something went wrong, and now you're stuck in a loop of random jumps in different paralel worlds, unable to return home. The only rule: you have to survive until the next jump and fund your way back home (hopefully).
creator: Kitty Kat 666
